text:
Maternal Child Adolescent Health (MCAH) Program | Sutter County, CA
Show/Hide
ROAD CLOSURES
COMMUNITY ACADEMY
Sutter County Public Health is dedicated to promoting the mental and physical health of pregnant women, infants, children, teens, and their families in our community. Sutter County MCAH offers an array of programs to meet families' needs and improve their health and wellness. Please follow the links below to learn about MCAH services:
Reproductive Health and Prenatal Care Access
Assistance finding free or low-cost quality reproductive and prenatal care
Support to promote health in pregnancy
Perinatal Mood and Anxiety Support
Create support plans and coping strategies
Connect to behavioral/mental health care providers
Infant Safe Sleep Program
Offer safety approved portable cribs free of cost
Educate to reduce the risk of SIDS and other sleep-related deaths
Lactation Support
Help and support to meet breastfeeding goals
Telephone and in-person consultations
Families with Children with Special Health Care Needs
Connect with specialty services and resources
Support to overcome challenges
Healthy Families Sutter County Home Visiting Program
Support from a Family Support Specialist beginning before or right after birth through baby's 3
rd
birthday
Empower parents with skills to help their children and family thrive
